'''Chorkun''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed [[Parmorak sector/Legends|Parmorak sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Chorkun controlled Parmorak sector until he was mysteriously [[Death/Legends|eliminated]] by an unknown [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]]. It was rumored that his killer was [[Kassar Kosciusko]], an [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] operative.
